en.k3d: 3 strength · 2 swims · 1 hike · 22,298 kg Hevy volume
en.eNote: No meals logged for Jul 4 – Jul 10 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 439 kcal/day, peaking 665 on Wednesday's pool intervals and 644 on Sunday's Zagreb hike. Monday (Jul 6) was a full rest day (63 kcal); Friday (Jul 10) is just starting — rest day planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −853 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Friday (Jul 10) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Wednesday's pool set was the week's hardest swim
en.i1: Wednesday's 2.2 km pool session (10×100 / 10×50, avg HR 127, max 153, 65 min) drove 769 active kcal — the biggest single-session burn of the week and a clear step up in intensity from the easy open-water and technique swims.
en.i2t: Aerobic base: two swims plus a hike
en.i2: Aerobic work came from Sunday's 7.1 km Zagreb hike (avg HR 117, 731 kcal), Wednesday's harder pool intervals, and Thursday's short 0.8 km pool swim (avg HR 111) — a good mix of easy volume and one quality session.
en.i3: After the midweek dip, RHR eased back to 54 this morning (−3 vs yesterday, right on the 7-day average) and HRV recovered to 40 (+8 vs the previous night, at the 41 baseline). Last night was the window's best — 8h27 at score 83 — with deep 1h26 and REM back to 1h43.
en.i4t: Three lifts; hack squat still the tonnage leader
en.i4: Hevy tonnage this window: Saturday's trap-bar deadlift 8,312 kg and Tuesday's hack squat 13,986 kg — 22,298 kg logged. Thursday added a squat session (Garmin: 59 min, avg HR 108) not yet synced to Hevy, so its volume isn't counted.
en.rec: Friday is a planned rest day. The week behind: 6 sessions across 5 active days (6h02, ~3,341 active kcal) — three strength sessions (trap-bar DL 8,312 kg, hack squat 13,986 kg, plus Thursday's squat), two swims (a 2.2 km pool interval set and a short technique swim) and Sunday's 7.1 km Zagreb hike. Monday was a full rest day. Recovery has turned the corner: after Wednesday–Thursday's dip, RHR is back to 54 and HRV up to 40 (at baseline) off the window's best night — 8h27 at score 83. Take the rest day, and Saturday's trap-bar deadlift should land on fresh legs. Next: Sat trap-bar DL, then rest/hike Sunday per plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-07-04 → 2026-07-10 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 3 snage · 2 plivanja · 1 planinarenje · 22.298 kg Hevy volumen
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 4.7. – 10.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 439 kcal/dan, vrhunac 665 na srijedinim bazenskim intervalima i 644 na nedjeljnom planinarenju u Zagrebu. Ponedjeljak (6.7.) je bio potpuni dan odmora (63 kcal); petak (10.7.) tek počinje — planiran dan odmora.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −853 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Petak (10.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Srijedin bazenski set bio je najteže plivanje tjedna
hr.i1: Srijedino plivanje 2,2 km u bazenu (10×100 / 10×50, prosj. puls 127, maks 153, 65 min) donijelo je 769 aktivnih kcal — najveća potrošnja pojedinačnog treninga u tjednu i jasan skok intenziteta u odnosu na lagana plivanja na otvorenom i tehniku.
hr.i2t: Aerobna baza: dva plivanja i planinarenje
hr.i2: Aerobni rad došao je iz nedjeljnog planinarenja 7,1 km u Zagrebu (prosj. puls 117, 731 kcal), srijedinih težih bazenskih intervala i četvrtkovog kratkog plivanja 0,8 km (prosj. puls 111) — dobra mješavina lagane volumene i jednog kvalitetnog treninga.
hr.i3t: Oporavak: autonomika se preko noći vratila
hr.i3: Nakon pada sredinom tjedna, RHR se jutros vratio na 54 (−3 vs jučer, točno na 7-dnevnom prosjeku), a HRV oporavio na 40 (+8 vs prethodna noć, na osnovici od 41). Sinoć je bila najbolja u razdoblju — 8h27 uz ocjenu 83 — uz duboki san 1h26 i REM natrag na 1h43.
hr.i4t: Tri dizanja; hack squat i dalje vodi u tonaži
hr.i4: Hevy tonaža ovog razdoblja: subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje 8.312 kg i utorkov hack squat 13.986 kg — ukupno 22.298 kg zabilježeno. Četvrtak je dodao trening čučnja (Garmin: 59 min, prosj. puls 108) koji još nije sinkroniziran s Hevyjem, pa se njegov volumen ne broji.
hr.rec: Petak je planiran dan odmora. Tjedan iza: 6 treninga kroz 5 aktivnih dana (6h02, ~3.341 aktivnih kcal) — tri treninga snage (trap-bar MD 8.312 kg, hack squat 13.986 kg, plus četvrtkov čučanj), dva plivanja (bazenski intervalni set 2,2 km i kratko tehničko plivanje) i nedjeljno planinarenje 7,1 km u Zagrebu. Ponedjeljak je bio potpuni odmor. Oporavak je prošao prekretnicu: nakon pada u srijedu–četvrtak, RHR je natrag na 54, a HRV na 40 (na osnovici) nakon najbolje noći u razdoblju — 8h27 uz ocjenu 83. Iskoristi dan odmora i subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje trebalo bi pasti na svježe noge. Sljedeće: sub trap-bar MD, zatim odmor/planinarenje u nedjelju po planu.
hr.foot: Podaci: 4.7. → 10.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
